---
title: "Lecture 1"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-location: left
    number-sections: true
  pdf:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
---

# Lecture 1: title of lecture

## Learning Objectives

- *Add your learning objectives here.*

## 1. first section
### 1.1. first subsection
#### 1.1.1. first subsubsection




## Main Concepts

- *Main concept 1*
- *Main concept 2*
- *Main concept 3*

## Definitions

::: {.callout-definition}
**Term 1.** *Definition placeholder.*
:::

::: {.callout-definition}
**Term 2.** *Definition placeholder.*
:::

## Key Formulas

$$
\text{Formula placeholder: } PV = \frac{F}{(1+r)^n}
$$



## Suggested Readings

- *Textbook chapter or paper reference*
- *Supplementary material*
